observation and monitoring of the patient's blood pressure and medication regimen is 
required until the blood pressure remains stable and in a safe range. The patient’s 
necessity for skilled observation must be documented at each home health visit, until the 
patient's clinical condition and/or treatment regimen has stabilized.
